overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a futuristic apartment bedroom in Cyberpunk 2077, looking out a large panoramic window at the Night City skyline during blue hour. The scene features occasional flying vehicles passing by the window while the interior remains dimly lit with ambient artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

second flying vehicle passes by outside the window

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary inside a dimly lit futuristic apartment bedroom, positioned behind an unmade bed with white sheets. Through a large panoramic window, the Night City skyline is visible during blue hour, featuring a prominent cylindrical skyscraper on the right. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window, momentarily entering and exiting the frame against the backdrop of the illuminated city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from within a dimly lit futuristic bedroom, gazing out toward the sprawling urban expanse of Night City during the blue hour. It begins positioned behind an unmade bed with white sheets, framing a wide view of the skyline through a large panoramic window. As the camera holds its position, the deep blue light of the atmosphere contrasts with the artificial glow of the city, highlighting a prominent cylindrical skyscraper on the right. The scene remains still, punctuated only by the rhythmic movement of flying vehicles that glide across the frame, momentarily intersecting the view of the illuminated metropolis.
